text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Teio! Today's the day you finally admit defeat!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you're even louder than normal. All right,
I'll bite. What's got you excited enough to bother
me?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Listen close! Yesterday during the rain, I trained
on the track when it was super muddy!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: And you won't believe who came up to me! She said, "Running on a muddy track... You're no cur-mud-geon."

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What's that mean? Sounds like some kinda
pun...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh... That's right! Your precious prez
gave me a compliment!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Then she was all like, "I can't let the mud muddle
my senses either" or something, like... she was
challenging me? And we even ran together!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: That's how great she thought my running was!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You went partner running with her?! Errrgh! I
could brush this off if it was just the pun, but
now...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Watch out! I'm gonna come up with an amazing
plan to beat you in no time at all!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Gahaha! I'll be ready for ya!
